title: Tonai Lehr
compiled_truth: Tonai Lehr is an Enron employee at [Enron](companies/enron). Over the corpus period (1980-01-01 to 2002-02-13), Tonai Lehr sent 12 and received 114 emails, totalling 126 interactions. Top correspondents: [Brian Redmond](people/brian-redmond) (12), [Arvel Martin](people/arvel-martin) (12), [Christopher Clark](people/christopher-clark) (12), [Walt Hamilton](people/walt-hamilton) (12), [Rusty Belflower](people/rusty-belflower) (12).
